releaseNotes: Fixed crash found in live log: Player is accessed on the wrong thread
Moved restoreLastState player calls to Dispatchers.Main
Fixed restore queue calls: player.setMediaItems and player.prepare
Fixed restore single item calls: player.setMediaItem, player.prepare and player.seekTo
Stable v6.0 permission flow remains active
Music/Video MIME, size and duration filters from v6.5.22.02 remain active
